halt_set_amendments.description: Verdict-209 Halt 2 ('LMFDB cross-reference shows no overlap with PCF-2 ring-class field data') reclassified as DEAD-CODE pending RULE 1 lift + LMFDB-team pre-contact authorization. Halt cannot trigger by construction while D-1d row is BLOCKED.
halt_set_amendments.reactivation_condition: RULE 1 lift (per M10 V0 closure or documented-commitment) AND LMFDB-team pre-contact authorization clearance
halt_set_amendments.cascade_123_compliance: halt-set composition change does NOT relax any standing halt per most-conservative-LABEL rule; remaining 5 halts (1-refined, 3-refined, 4, 6, 7 in verdict-209 numbering) all remain active

rationale_no_halt: Verdict-210 absorption is structural / documentation work; no numerical claim contradicts prior AEAL log; no unexpected positive result; no pre-screen discrepancy >5%; no NaN/inf/negative residual. Q-210-2 α-prior inversion is a documented uncertainty resolution, not a halt-triggering contradiction.
halts_active_post_absorption: Halt 1 (refined): db.identify zero substantive hits per ≥80% PCF-1 v1.3 sample (operational definition)
Halt 3 (refined): CMF reinterpretation produces no theorem / new conjecture / falsifiable predicate after ≥3 working-note iterations
Halt 4: operator capacity envelope exceeded by Week-2 mid-point
Halt 6: strategic-landscape doc stale-label rate >30% on Week-1 recon target rows (re-verified today, currently 10-20% — NOT triggered; bridge SHA b7a7c7a)
Halt 7: LIReC database leakage of unpublished SIARC results (audit-then-investigate, not auto-rollback)
halts_dead_code_pending_rule_1_lift: Halt 2: LMFDB cross-reference (gated on D-1d which is BLOCKED per Amendment 1)
